Zero Data Loss Recovery Appliance
Release 12.2
Zero Data Loss Recovery Appliance 12.2
Get Started
Learn about the Recovery Appliance
The Recovery Appliance protects your enterprise-wide database environment, eliminating data loss and backup overhead, while delivering Oracle-validated recoverability and cloud-ready scalability.
Introduction to the Recovery Appliance
Rack and Server Components
Install and Configure the Recovery Appliance
Oracle Advanced Customer Services (ACS) or Certified Recovery Appliance Partners from the Oracle Partner Network (OPN) perform installation and configuration.
Oracle Advanced Customer Service (ACS)
Oracle Partner Network (OPN) Recovery Appliance Partner Program
Hardware Installation and Configuration
Site Requirements and Preparation
Software Installation and Configuration
Maintenance and Re-Configuration
Administer the Recovery Appliance
The Recovery Appliance administrator creates protection policies, associates them to databases, manages space, handles user accounts, and monitors operation.
Managing Protection Policies
Copying Backups to Tape
Archiving Backups to the Cloud
Accessing Recovery Appliance Reports
Monitoring the Recovery Appliance
Database Backup & Recovery
Database backup administrators configure a database to send backups to the Recovery Appliance and handle recovery operations from the Recovery Appliance.
Configure Protected Databases
Backup Protected Databases
Recover Databases
